name: Discord
description: Discord is a voice, video, and text chat platform organized around persistent servers and channels, widely used by gaming and online communities.

years.notes: Original 2015 launch mark — Clyde inside a speech-bubble silhouette, rendered in the legacy 'blurple' #7289DA. Used until the June 2021 rebrand.
June 2021 refresh — speech bubble removed, refined Clyde mascot standalone with the brighter new blurple #5865F2.
